'''tofadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachnological|arachnological]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachnological|arachnological]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tofadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tofadithi|tofadithi]] || [[word:tofadiji|tofadiji]] || [[word:tofadishi|tofadishi]] || [[word:tofadiki|tofadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tofaduthuthu|tofaduthuthu]] || [[word:tofadujuju|tofadujuju]] || [[word:tofadushushu|tofadushushu]] || [[word:tofadukuku|tofadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tofaduthu|tofaduthu]] || [[word:tofaduju|tofaduju]] || [[word:tofadushu|tofadushu]] || [[word:tofaduku|tofaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tofadufthuf|tofadufthuf]] || [[word:tofadufjuf|tofadufjuf]] || [[word:tofadufshuf|tofadufshuf]] || [[word:tofadufkuf|tofadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tofadethe|tofadethe]] || [[word:tofadeje|tofadeje]] || [[word:tofadeshe|tofadeshe]] || [[word:tofadeke|tofadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tofadothotho|tofadothotho]] || [[word:tofadojojo|tofadojojo]] || [[word:tofadoshosho|tofadoshosho]] || [[word:tofadokoko|tofadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tofadotho|tofadotho]] || [[word:tofadojo|tofadojo]] || [[word:tofadosho|tofadosho]] || [[word:tofadoko|tofadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tofadofthof|tofadofthof]] || [[word:tofadofjof|tofadofjof]] || [[word:tofadofshof|tofadofshof]] || [[word:tofadofkof|tofadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tofadïfthïf|tofadïfthïf]] || [[word:tofadïfjïf|tofadïfjïf]] || [[word:tofadïfshïf|tofadïfshïf]] || [[word:tofadïfkïf|tofadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tofadïfthïfthïf|tofadïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:tofadïfjïfjïf|tofadïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:tofadïfshïfshïf|tofadïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:tofadïfkïfkïf|tofadïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tofadïfthïf|tofadïfthïf]] || [[word:tofadïfjïf|tofadïfjïf]] || [[word:tofadïfshïf|tofadïfshïf]] || [[word:tofadïfkïf|tofadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tofadïfthïf|tofadïfthïf]] || [[word:tofadïfjïf|tofadïfjïf]] || [[word:tofadïfshïf|tofadïfshïf]] || [[word:tofadïfkïf|tofadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tofadæthæ|tofadæthæ]] || [[word:tofadæjæ|tofadæjæ]] || [[word:tofadæshæ|tofadæshæ]] || [[word:tofadækæ|tofadækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tofadathatha|tofadathatha]] || [[word:tofadajaja|tofadajaja]] || [[word:tofadashasha|tofadashasha]] || [[word:tofadakaka|tofadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tofadatha|tofadatha]] || [[word:tofadaja|tofadaja]] || [[word:tofadasha|tofadasha]] || [[word:tofadaka|tofadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tofadafthaf|tofadafthaf]] || [[word:tofadafjaf|tofadafjaf]] || [[word:tofadafshaf|tofadafshaf]] || [[word:tofadafkaf|tofadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tofadasha|tofadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tofadshësha|tofadshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tofadrosha|tofadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tofadmusha|tofadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tofadyasha|tofadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotofadnkshësha|gotofadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotofadnkrosha|gotofadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotofadnkmusha|gotofadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotofadnkyasha|gotofadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tofafadasha|tofafadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tofafadshësha|tofafadshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tofafadrosha|tofafadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tofafadmusha|tofafadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tofafadyasha|tofafadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotofafadnkshësha|gotofafadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotofafadnkrosha|gotofafadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotofafadnkmusha|gotofafadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotofafadnkyasha|gotofafadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tefædasha|tefædasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tefædshësha|tefædshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tefædrosha|tefædrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tefædmusha|tefædmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tefædyasha|tefædyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotefædnkshësha|gotefædnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotefædnkrosha|gotefædnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotefædnkmusha|gotefædnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotefædnkyasha|gotefædnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tofadasha|tofadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tofadshësha|tofadshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tofadrosha|tofadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tofadmusha|tofadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tofadyasha|tofadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotofadnkshësha|gotofadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotofadnkrosha|gotofadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotofadnkmusha|gotofadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotofadnkyasha|gotofadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
